title: [Origin] Forest Dragon
description: Become a ferocious beast of the wilds!
body:
### With forests and jungles as your domain, you can be a nimble predator of the woodlands!

🐲 This datapack contains two origins:
1. **Forest Dragon** - the intended feral experience
1. **Forest Dragon alt.** - almost identical to the main origin but allows you to wear any type of armour at the cost of weaker natural armour and no extra toughness

## ✅Requires✅
- [**Origins**](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)

## 🐉The Powers🐉
### 🌲Tree Dweller _(Primary key)_ 
- **Your powerful claws and legs allow you to climb trees and take less fall damage**
- You can climb on any type of leaves or logs (toggle with key)
- You take -70% fall damage

### 🐽Sniff _(Secondary key)_
- **You can detect nearby mobs if you focus on the scents in the air**
- 2.4 seconds of entity glow after a 1.2 seconds delay
- 24 blocks range
- 14 seconds cooldown
- gives Slowness III and disables sprinting while active

### ⚔️Sharp Claws
- **Your bare claws allow you to deal more damage and dig faster**
- +5 damage when unarmed
- +120% digging speed when unarmed (digging affects blocks that shovels and hoes can dig)

### 🔥Fire Resistance
- **A dragon's tough scaly hide naturally evolved to not burn easily**
- -50% fire damage taken

### 🍔Dragon's Belly
- **Dragons have evolved to be the most efficient on full stomachs**
- lower exhaustion rate when full
- faster exhaustion rate when _not_ full

### 🦎Non-Human Body _(main origin only)_
- **Due to the shape of your body, you can only wear chest armour**
- Prevents wearing armour on head, legs, and feet

### 🍖Raw Carnivore
- **Your guts are specialised in digesting raw meat**
- Raw meats give +2 food and +2.5 saturation on top of normal values
- Cooked meats give 10 seconds of Hunger
- Non-meat foods give 20 seconds of Hunger and 5 seconds of Poison II

### 🐾Sprint Build-Up
- **While sprinting, you gain extra speed and jump power over time**
- Up to 25% speed
- Up to 12.5% jump power (enough to jump over 2 blocks)

### 🛡️Tough Scales
- **Your tough scales provide an extra layer of defense**
- +8 armour and +8 toughness _(main origin only)_
- +5 armour _(alt origin only)_

### 👁️Night Vision
- **Your eyes are adapted to seeing even in the densest of forests, where tree canopies cover up the sky completely**
- +0.3 night vision
